note: The drum column token set is identical to Time Picker, Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker. The 'from'/'to' labels introduce an additional typography token (Medium weight) not present in the other drum pickers.

surface/neutral/default.description: Container background color in DS Core light theme. In the Customer App, the picker renders on --bg-surface-default (#1d1d23, dark theme).

text/primary.description: Color of the selected (centre) item in each drum column. In dark-theme app context, resolves to #f1f2f4.

text/placeholder.description: Color of all non-selected drum column items and the 'from'/'to' labels. In dark-theme app context, resolves to #a3a3bc.

fontFamily.description: Font family for all drum column items.

fontWeight.description: Font weight for drum column items. All items use Regular regardless of selection state.

fontFamily.description: Font family for the 'from' and 'to' static labels.

fontWeight.description: Font weight for the 'from' and 'to' labels. Medium — distinct from drum column items (Regular).

fontSize.description: Font size for the 'from' and 'to' labels.

letterSpacing.description: Letter spacing for the 'from' and 'to' labels.

lineHeight.description: Line height for the 'from' and 'to' labels.

selected.description: Font size for the selected (centre) drum item at position 4.

closeNeighbor.description: Font size for items one position above/below the selection (positions 3 and 5).

farNeighbor.description: Font size for items two positions above/below the selection (positions 2 and 6).

furthestNeighbor.description: Font size for items three positions above/below the selection (positions 1 and 7).
Opacity for drum items at positions 1 and 7.

farNeighbor.description: Opacity for drum items at positions 2 and 6.

visibleNeighbor.description: Opacity for drum items at positions 3, 4 (selected), and 5.

boundaryMask.description: Opacity for start-of-range slots in the from-age column (positions 1–3). Items are present in the DOM but invisible.

columnGroupGap.description: Horizontal gap between all elements in the column group (labels and drum columns share the same gap).

itemGap.description: Vertical gap between items within each drum column.

selectionIndicatorHeight.description: Height of the selection highlight stripe.

columnGroupOffset.description: Horizontal right offset of the column group from the component centre (confirmed from Figma: left: calc(50% + 4px)). TODO: Confirm whether intentional.
